list: Each of the following programs has some kind of defect. Inspect each program (visually, not by compiling) and determine what is wrong with the program. The output of each program is supposed to be “Derived”.

content.code:
Circle(Point(1, 2), radius 7)
Triangle(Point(1, 2), Point(3, 4), Point(5, 6))
Circle(Point(7, 8), radius 3)
The largest radius is: 7
